hazards.description: Sao Paulo reports urban flooding driven by intense rainfall, with transport corridors and low-lying neighborhoods facing repeated disruption.
Sao Paulo identifies water stress as a priority risk, especially during prolonged dry periods that strain supply reservoirs.

goals.description: Expand urban drainage capacity in flood-prone districts
Reduce water losses across the municipal distribution network

actions.title: Engineered and built environment actions: Expansion of retention basins and drainage works
Government policies and programs actions: Watershed protection and demand management
Technological actions: Flood monitoring and early warning upgrades

cases.question: What urban flooding hazard is described for Sao Paulo?
What is Sao Paulo's goal for the municipal water distribution network?
expectedContains: Reduce water losses across the municipal distribution network

cases.question: What actions is Sao Paulo taking for urban flooding?
expectedContains: Expansion of retention basins and drainage works
Flood monitoring and early warning upgrades
